debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
I J : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
h_J_le_I : I ≤ J
h_I_le_J : J ≤ I
h_final_left : ∀ N ∈ J, N ∈ I
⊢ ∀ N ∈ I, N ∈ J

proof:
intro N hN
      rcases RefinementMapSurj' J I h_J_le_I ⟨N, hN⟩ with ⟨B, hNB⟩
      rcases h_I_le_J hN with ⟨A, hAJ, hA_eq⟩
      have hBmem : B.val ∈ A := by
        by_contra h
        have h_disj : Disjoint B.val N := hA_eq ▸ J.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup B.prop hAJ h
        exact I.not_bot_mem (h_disj.symm.eq_bot_of_le hNB ▸ hN)
      have h_B_eq_N : B.val = N := by
        exact le_antisymm (hA_eq ▸ le_sSup hBmem) hNB
      aesop
failed_attempts:
intro N hN
      by_contra hNJ
      have h_disj := I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup hN h_final_left hNJ
      rw [J.sSup_eq_top, disjoint_top] at h_disj
      exact I.not_bot_mem (h_disj ▸ hN)
    ext N; exact ⟨h_final_right N, h_final_left N⟩

intro N hNI
      rcases h_I_le_J hNI with ⟨B, hBJ, hB⟩
      rcases RefinementMapSurj' J I h_J_le_I ⟨N, hNI⟩ with ⟨A, hNA⟩
      have h_mem : A.val ∈ B := by
        by_contra h_not_mem
        have h_disj : Disjoint A.val (sSup B) := J.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup A.prop hBJ h_not_mem
        have h_le : sSup B ≤ A.val := hB ▸ hNA
        exact I.not_bot_mem (hB ▸ (Disjoint.eq_bot_of_le h_disj h_le) ▸ hNI)
      exact (le_antisymm hNA (hB ▸ le_sSup h_mem)) ▸ A.prop
    ext1; exact Set.ext (λ N => ⟨h_final_right N, h_final_left N⟩)

intro N h_N_in_I
      obtain ⟨B, h_BJ, h_N_eq_sSup_B⟩ := h_I_le_J h_N_in_I
      have h_N_in_B : N ∈ B := by
        by_contra h_N_not_in_B
        have h_disj := sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup I.sSupIndep' h_N_in_I (fun M hM ↦ h_final_left M (h_BJ hM)) h_N_not_in_B
        rw [← h_N_eq_sSup_B, disjoint_self] at h_disj
        exact I.not_bot_mem (h_disj ▸ h_N_in_I)
      exact h_BJ h_N_in_B
    ext
    exact Set.Subset.antisymm h_final_right h_final_left

intro N hN
      rcases RefinementMapSurj' J I h_J_le_I ⟨N, hN⟩ with ⟨A, hNA⟩
      have hAI : A.val ∈ I := h_final_left A.val A.prop
      have h_eq : A.val = N := congr_arg Subtype.val (UniqueGE I I ⟨N, hN⟩ ⟨A.val, hAI⟩ ⟨N, hN⟩ ⟨hNA, le_rfl⟩)
      exact h_eq ▸ A.prop
    ext; aesop

intro N hN
      by_contra h_not_in
      have h_disj : Disjoint N (sSup J.carrier) :=
        sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup I.sSupIndep' hN h_final_left h_not_in
      have h_le : N ≤ sSup J.carrier := by rw [J.sSup_eq_top]; exact le_top
      exact I.not_bot_mem (h_disj.eq_bot_of_le h_le ▸ hN)
    ext x; exact ⟨h_final_right x, h_final_left x⟩

intro N hN
      rcases RefinementMapSurj' J I h_J_le_I ⟨N, hN⟩ with ⟨A, hNA⟩
      rcases h_I_le_J hN with ⟨B, hBJ, rfl⟩
      have : A.val ∈ B := by
        by_contra hAnB
        exact J.not_bot_mem (Disjoint.eq_bot_of_le (J.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup A.prop hBJ hAnB).symm hNA)
      exact (le_antisymm (le_sSup this) hNA) ▸ A.prop
    ext N; exact ⟨h_final_right N, h_final_left N⟩

intro N hN
      rcases RefinementMapSurj' J I h_J_le_I ⟨N, hN⟩ with ⟨A, hNA⟩
      have h := UniqueGE I I ⟨N, hN⟩ ⟨N, hN⟩ ⟨A.val, h_final_left _ A.prop⟩ ⟨le_rfl, hNA⟩
      exact Subtype.ext_iff.mp h ▸ A.prop
    ext; aesop

intro N hN
      rcases RefinementMapSurj' J I h_J_le_I ⟨N, hN⟩ with ⟨A, hNA⟩
      choose f hf hf' using h_I_le_J
      have h_mem : A.val ∈ f hN := by
        by_contra h
        have h_dis : Disjoint A.val (sSup (f hN)) := J.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup A.prop (hf hN) h
        have h_le : sSup (f hN) ≤ A.val := hf' hN ▸ hNA
        exact I.not_bot_mem (hf' hN ▸ (disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_dis h_le) ▸ hN)
      exact (le_antisymm ((hf' hN).symm ▸ le_sSup h_mem) hNA) ▸ A.prop
    ext x; exact ⟨h_final_right x, h_final_left x⟩

intro N hN
      by_contra hNJ
      have h_disj := I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup hN h_final_left hNJ
      rw [J.sSup_eq_top] at h_disj
      exact I.not_bot_mem (disjoint_top_right.mp h_disj ▸ hN)
    ext; aesop

intro N hN
      rcases h_I_le_J hN with ⟨B, hBJ, rfl⟩
      by_contra h_NJ
      have h_disj := I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup hN (fun x hx ↦ h_final_left x (hBJ hx)) (fun h ↦ h_NJ (hBJ h))
      exact I.not_bot_mem (disjoint_self_iff.mp h_disj ▸ hN)
    have h_final_right : ∀ N ∈ I, N ∈ J := by
      sorry

intro N h_N_in_I
      rcases RefinementMapSurj' J I h_J_le_I ⟨N, h_N_in_I⟩ with ⟨A, h_N_le_A⟩
      rcases h_I_le_J h_N_in_I with ⟨B, h_B_sub_J, rfl⟩
      have h_mem : A.val ∈ B := by
        by_contra h_A_not_mem
        have h_disj : Disjoint A.val (sSup B) := J.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup A.prop h_B_sub_J h_A_not_mem
        exact I.not_bot_mem (h_disj.symm.eq_bot_of_le h_N_le_A ▸ h_N_in_I)
      exact (le_antisymm (le_sSup h_mem) h_N_le_A) ▸ A.prop
    ext; constructor <;> assumption

intro N h_N
      rcases h_I_le_J h_N with ⟨B, h_BJ, rfl⟩
      by_cases h_mem : N ∈ B
      · exact h_BJ h_mem
      · have h_disj : Disjoint N (sSup B) := I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup h_N (fun x hx ↦ h_final_left x (h_BJ hx)) h_mem
        exact (I.not_bot_mem (Disjoint.eq_bot_of_le h_disj le_rfl ▸ h_N)).elim
    ext N
    exact ⟨h_final_right N, h_final_left N⟩

intro N hN
      by_contra hNJ
      exact I.not_bot_mem <| (I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup hN h_final_left hNJ).eq_bot_of_ge J.sSup_eq_top.ge
    ext; exact ⟨h_final_right _, h_final_left _⟩

intro N h_N_in_I
      obtain ⟨A, h_N_le_A⟩ := RefinementMapSurj' J I h_J_le_I ⟨N, h_N_in_I⟩
      obtain ⟨B, h_sub_J, h_N_eq_sSup_B⟩ := h_I_le_J h_N_in_I
      have h_mem : A.val ∈ B := by
        by_contra h_A_not_mem
        have h_disj := (J.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup A.prop h_sub_J h_A_not_mem).symm
        have h_bot := h_disj.eq_bot_of_le (h_N_eq_sSup_B ▸ h_N_le_A)
        exact I.not_bot_mem (h_N_eq_sSup_B ▸ h_bot ▸ h_N_in_I)
      have h_A_le_N : A.val ≤ N := h_N_eq_sSup_B ▸ le_sSup h_mem
      exact (le_antisymm h_A_le_N h_N_le_A) ▸ A.prop
    ext; aesop

intro N hN
      obtain ⟨B, hBJ, rfl⟩ := h_I_le_J hN
      have : sSup B ∈ B := by
        by_contra h
        exact I.not_bot_mem ((I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup hN (fun x hx => h_final_left x (hBJ hx)) h).eq_bot ▸ hN)
      exact hBJ this
    ext N; exact ⟨h_final_right N, h_final_left N⟩

intro N hN
      rcases h_I_le_J hN with ⟨B, hBJ, rfl⟩
      have hBI : B ⊆ I := fun x hx => h_final_left x (hBJ hx)
      by_cases hNB : N ∈ B
      · exact hBJ hNB
      · have h_disj := I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup hN hBI hNB
        exact (I.not_bot_mem (h_disj.eq_bot_of_le le_rfl ▸ hN)).elim
    ext x; exact ⟨h_final_right x, h_final_left x⟩

intro N hN
      rcases h_I_le_J hN with ⟨B, hBJ, rfl⟩
      obtain ⟨b, hb⟩ : B.Nonempty := by
        by_contra h; exact I.not_bot_mem (Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp h ▸ hN)
      have : b = N := by
        by_contra hne
        have h_dis : Disjoint b N := sSupIndep_pair hne |>.mp (I.sSupIndep.mono (by
          intro x hx; rcases hx with rfl | rfl; exacts [h_final_left b (hBJ hb), hN]))
        exact J.not_bot_mem (h_dis.eq_bot_of_le (le_sSup hb) le_rfl ▸ hBJ hb)
      exact this ▸ hBJ hb
    apply SetLike.coe_injective
    ext N
    exact ⟨h_final_right N, h_final_left N⟩

intro N hN
      rcases RefinementMapSurj' J I h_J_le_I ⟨N, hN⟩ with ⟨B, hNB⟩
      rcases h_I_le_J hN with ⟨C, hCJ, rfl⟩
      have hB : B.val ∈ C := by
        by_contra hBnot
        exact I.not_bot_mem (Disjoint.eq_bot_of_le (J.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup B.prop hCJ hBnot).symm hNB ▸ hN)
      exact (le_antisymm (le_sSup hB) hNB) ▸ B.prop
    ext N; exact ⟨h_final_right N, h_final_left N⟩

intro N h_N_in_I
      rcases RefinementMapSurj' J I h_J_le_I ⟨N, h_N_in_I⟩ with ⟨A, h_N_le_A⟩
      rcases h_I_le_J h_N_in_I with ⟨B, h_B, h_B_sup⟩
      have h_mem : A.val ∈ B := by
        by_contra h_not
        exact I.not_bot_mem (Disjoint.eq_bot_of_le (J.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup A.prop h_B h_not).symm (h_B_sup ▸ h_N_le_A) ▸ h_N_in_I)
      exact (h_N_le_A.antisymm (h_B_sup.symm ▸ le_sSup h_mem)).symm ▸ A.prop
    ext x; exact ⟨h_final_right x, h_final_left x⟩

intro N h_N_in_I
      rcases RefinementMapSurj' J I h_J_le_I ⟨N, h_N_in_I⟩ with ⟨B, h_N_le_B⟩
      rcases h_I_le_J h_N_in_I with ⟨f, h_f_sub, h_f_sup⟩
      have h_mem : B.val ∈ f := by
        by_contra h_B_not_mem
        have h_disj := J.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup B.prop h_f_sub h_B_not_mem
        have h_le : sSup f ≤ B.val := h_f_sup ▸ h_N_le_B
        exact I.not_bot_mem (h_f_sup.symm ▸ h_disj.symm.eq_bot_of_le h_le ▸ h_N_in_I)
      exact (le_antisymm h_N_le_B (h_f_sup.symm ▸ le_sSup h_mem)).symm ▸ B.prop
    ext; exact Set.Subset.antisymm h_final_right h_final_left

intro N h_N_in_I
      rcases RefinementMapSurj' J I h_J_le_I ⟨N, h_N_in_I⟩ with ⟨A, h_N_le_A⟩
      rcases h_I_le_J h_N_in_I with ⟨B, h_sub, h_eq⟩
      have h_mem : A.val ∈ B := by
        by_contra h_not_mem
        have h_disj := J.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup A.prop h_sub h_not_mem
        have h_bot : sSup B = ⊥ := Disjoint.eq_bot_of_le h_disj.symm (h_eq ▸ h_N_le_A)
        rw [← h_eq] at h_bot
        subst h_bot
        exact I.not_bot_mem h_N_in_I
      exact (h_eq ▸ le_sSup h_mem).antisymm h_N_le_A ▸ A.prop
    ext; aesop

intro N hNI
      rcases RefinementMapSurj' J I h_J_le_I ⟨N, hNI⟩ with ⟨A, hNA⟩
      rcases h_I_le_J hNI with ⟨B, hBJ, rfl⟩
      have hA : A.val ∈ B := by
        by_contra hAm
        exact I.not_bot_mem (J.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup A.prop hBJ hAm |>.symm.eq_bot_of_le hNA ▸ hNI)
      exact (le_sSup hA).antisymm hNA ▸ A.prop
    ext N; exact ⟨h_final_right N, h_final_left N⟩

intro N hN
      by_contra hNJ
      exact I.not_bot_mem (disjoint_top.mp (J.sSup_eq_top ▸ I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup hN h_final_left hNJ) ▸ hN)
    ext N
    exact ⟨h_final_right N, h_final_left N⟩

intro N hN
      by_contra hNJ
      have h_disj := I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup hN h_final_left hNJ
      rw [J.sSup_eq_top] at h_disj
      exact I.not_bot_mem (disjoint_top_right.mp h_disj ▸ hN)
    ext
    exact ⟨h_final_right, h_final_left⟩

intro N hN
      rcases RefinementMapSurj' J I h_J_le_I ⟨N, hN⟩ with ⟨A, hNA⟩
      have h_A_eq_N : A.val = N := by
        by_contra h_neq
        have h_dis : Disjoint A.val N := (sSupIndep_pair h_neq).mp (I.sSupIndep'.mono (by
          simp [Set.insert_subset_iff, hN, h_final_left A.val A.prop]))
        exact I.not_bot_mem (le_bot_iff.mp (h_dis.le_bot_of_le_right hNA) ▸ hN)
      rw [← h_A_eq_N]; exact A.prop
    ext N; exact ⟨h_final_right N, h_final_left N⟩

intro N h_N_in_I
      rcases RefinementMapSurj' J I h_J_le_I ⟨N, h_N_in_I⟩ with ⟨A, h_N_le_A⟩
      choose f hf hf' using h_I_le_J
      have h_mem : A.val ∈ f h_N_in_I := by
        by_contra h_A_not_mem
        have h_aux : Disjoint A.val (sSup (f h_N_in_I)) :=
          J.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup A.prop (hf h_N_in_I) h_A_not_mem
        have h_bot : sSup (f h_N_in_I) = (⊥ : PersistenceSubmodule M) :=
          (disjoint_comm.mp h_aux).eq_bot_of_le (hf' h_N_in_I ▸ h_N_le_A)
        exact I.not_bot_mem (hf' h_N_in_I ▸ h_bot ▸ h_N_in_I)
      exact (le_antisymm (hf' h_N_in_I ▸ le_sSup h_mem) h_N_le_A) ▸ A.prop
    ext; exact ⟨h_final_right, h_final_left⟩
h_final_left⟩

intro N hN
      rcases RefinementMapSurj' J I h_J_le_I ⟨N, hN⟩ with ⟨A, hNA⟩
      rcases h_I_le_J hN with ⟨B, hBJ, rfl⟩
      have h_mem : A.val ∈ B := by
        by_contra h_not_mem
        have h_disj := J.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup A.prop hBJ h_not_mem
        exact I.not_bot_mem (h_disj.symm.eq_bot_of_le hNA ▸ hN)
      rw [← le_antisymm (le_sSup h_mem) hNA]
      exact A.prop
    exact SetLike.coe_injective (Set.ext fun x => ⟨h_final_right x, h_final_left x⟩)

intro N hN
      by_contra hNJ
      have h_disj : Disjoint N (sSup J) := I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup hN h_final_left hNJ
      have h_bot : N = ⊥ := h_disj.eq_bot_of_le (J.sSup_eq_top.symm ▸ le_top)
      exact I.not_bot_mem (h_bot ▸ hN)
    ext; constructor; exact h_final_right; exact h_final_left

intro N hN
      rcases h_I_le_J hN with ⟨B, hBJ, hBsup⟩
      have hBI : B ⊆ I := fun x hx => h_final_left x (hBJ hx)
      have h_mem : N ∈ B := by
        by_contra h_not_mem
        have h_disj := I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup hN hBI h_not_mem
        rw [← hBsup] at h_disj
        have h_eq_bot : N = ⊥ := disjoint_self.mp h_disj
        exact I.not_bot_mem (h_eq_bot ▸ hN)
      exact hBJ h_mem
    ext x
    exact ⟨h_final_right x, h_final_left x⟩

intro N hN
      by_contra hNJ
      have h_disj : Disjoint N (sSup J) := I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup hN h_final_left hNJ
      rw [J.sSup_eq_top] at h_disj
      exact I.not_bot_mem (disjoint_top.mp h_disj ▸ hN)
    ext x; exact ⟨h_final_right x, h_final_left x⟩
successful_attempts:
intro N hN
      rcases RefinementMapSurj' J I h_J_le_I ⟨N, hN⟩ with ⟨B, hNB⟩
      rcases h_I_le_J hN with ⟨A, hAJ, hA_eq⟩
      have hBmem : B.val ∈ A := by
        by_contra h
        have h_disj : Disjoint B.val N := hA_eq ▸ J.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup B.prop hAJ h
        exact I.not_bot_mem (h_disj.symm.eq_bot_of_le hNB ▸ hN)
      have h_B_eq_N : B.val = N := by
        exact le_antisymm (hA_eq ▸ le_sSup hBmem) hNB
      aesop
